title: Gallesia gorazema
taxonomy: Gallesia gorazema is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America. The exact classification of Gallesia gorazema may vary depending on the source, but it is generally recognized as a member of the genus Gallesia. More specifically, it is classified within the family Annonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple family. Within the Annonaceae family, Gallesia gorazema is further classified into its respective genus and species.
uses: Gallesia gorazema, also known as the "devil's tree," has been reported to have various medicinal properties in traditional medicine.
